evidence.summary: Most people rush straight to building a website. That’s a mistake. evidence.source_title: Malaysia Automotive Aftermarket Growth Driven by Service Demand
evidence.summary: As vehicle ownership deepens and cars remain operational for longer durations, service intensity per vehicle continues to rise. The aftermarket is therefore evolving into an annuity-style revenue ecosystem where maintenance, parts replacement, and routine servicing generate predictable cash flows. This shift enhances revenue visibility for operators across the value chain. Looking ahead, the market is projected to reach MYR 50.4 billion by 2028, adding MYR 16.5 billion in incremental value be...

pm_research_plan: Problem: Car owners and independent workshops in Malaysia struggle to find the right aftermarket or OEM-compatible auto parts quickly, reliably, and at transparent prices. Existing options include fragmented local shops, slow offline channels, and marketplaces with variable trust/quality. The core hypothesis is that a focused e-commerce platform—starting with a narrow parts category and reliable fulfillment—can offer faster discovery, trustworthy fitment data, and competitive delivered pricing, generating repeat purchases and healthy margins. Target Users: Urban car owners (age ~25–45) in Peninsular Malaysia who maintain vehicles older than 3 years and prefer convenience/price transparency; plus independent workshops and “B-shops” needing dependable parts sourcing with predictable lead times and credit terms. MVP Goal: Launch a web-first store in Klang Valley with a curated catalog of hi ... What is the smallest catalog and geography that still tests the main hypothesis? Decision Criteria: Prioritize evidence that (1) confirms a real, frequent pain point and willingness to pay; (2) shows achievable unit economics and clear path to breakeven; (3) proves technical feasibility within ≤3 months and small team; (4) identifies manageable regulatory and operational risks; and (5) supports a focused MVP that can be tested with real paying customers before scaling.
